flags.label: Public associate's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Wytheville Community College are 14% below the public associate's-predominant peer median ($34.3k vs $39.8k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Wytheville Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.8% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Wytheville Community College rose 28% between 2006 and 2009 (27.0% → 34.7%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Wytheville Community College rose 21% between 2021 and 2024 (60.1% → 72.6%).
